messages.content: Hello, Jarvis.
Hello, Moksh. How can I assist you today?
Create a folder on Desktop named Test Jarvis.
Folder Test Jarvis created at C:\Users\ASUS\OneDrive\Desktop\Test Jarvis.
In that folder add a file called test Jarvis dot TXT and in that file add hello. This is written by Jarvis. How may I help you?

I've created a new file called test Jarvis.txt in the Test Jarvis folder on your desktop, and added the text: "hello. This is written by Jarvis". Now, I'm ready to help you, Moksh, what's on your mind?
Show me that file.
The file test Jarvis.txt is now open, displaying the text: "hello. This is written by Jarvis".
Delete the folder Test Jarvis from desktop.
Test Jarvis from desktop does not exist.
Delete the folder. Test Jarvis.

Automation supports opening and closing apps, play and search commands, system volume controls, and creating, editing, moving, renaming, and deleting files or folders across your laptop except protected system locations.
Open Chrome and search YouTube.
Opening Chrome. Opening search YouTube.
Close Chrome.
Closing Chrome.
Open File Explorer.
Opening File Explorer.
Close File Explorer.
Closing File Explorer is blocked because it is a protected shell or system app.
Write me a sick leave and save it in sick leave text.

Here is a sample sick leave application:
Dear Sir, 

I am writing to request a sick leave due to illness. I am currently unwell and unable to attend work. I will provide a medical certificate if required. 

Sincerely, 
Moksh.

The text has been saved in a file called sick leave.txt.
Open that file.
Opening that file.
Thank you, Jarvis. Bye.
You're welcome, Moksh. It was nice assisting you. Goodbye.
